projectDescription: A simple, stack-based programming language with a Python compiler and C++ virtual machine, designed for low-power hardware like the ESP8266.
keyFeatures: Stack-based execution model with a compact integer bytecode format
Python compiler translating .elin source to .outz bytecode
C++ virtual machine for executing compiled bytecode
Variables with strict definition-before-use and must-be-used enforcement
Arithmetic with proper operator precedence via Shunting Yard algorithm
Control flow: if/else conditionals and while loops
Automatic HALT insertion for programs that don't end with halt
Loop iteration limit of 999,999,999 to prevent infinite loops
publicApiSurface: Opcodes: PUSH(1), LOAD(2), STORE(3), ADD(4), SUB(5), MUL(6), DIV(7), PRINT(8), HALT(9)
Comparison opcodes: CMP_EQ(10), CMP_NEQ(11), CMP_LT(12), CMP_LTE(13), CMP_GT(14), CMP_GTE(15)
